context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.screen_position: Spawns at Echo's sides (55 or 73, y=60), drifts horizontally
context.usage_scenario: 2-3 feathers spawn during preening animation, drift sideways and fade

visual_specification.shape: Small irregular oval representing tiny feather

animation.description: Frames 1-8: feather drifts horizontally 8px (left or right), slight downward arc 2px, fades in final 2 frames

visual_specification.details: Orange feather (#FFA300) 2x2px, spawns on left or right side of Echo, drifts outward 8px horizontally with slight downward curve (2px down), fades at 75% of animation, 2-3 feathers per preening cycle

relationships.shared_with: All particle effects share temporary display behavior
relationships.differences_from: heart_particle (movement direction), note_particle (size and color), dust_particle (context)

explicit_negations: No upward movement (only sideways and slightly down)
